prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-MOODLIGHT-RECTANGLE-2PK Product Type: LAMP Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 2pk 7 Color LED Color Changing Light 5 Inch Home Decor Mood Lighting Description: Add some colorful ambiance to your home with the Universal Home Color Changing LED Light.

This light features a bright LED that cycles through 7 different colors, creating a warm and inviting environment. It stands about 5" tall and the base is 3" wide, making it the perfect size for an end table, coffee table or bookshelf. The base comes with 4 foam grips to keep the light in place. It can even double as a nightlight for young children. This is a great addition to any living room, kitchen, den or bedroom. Search Terms: home decor lighting mood lights led color changing Features: - Universal Home LED Color Changing Light - 7 Different Colors - Dimensions: 5" x 3" x 3" - Colors: Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Blue, Purple & White - Material: Durable Plastic - Requires 2 AA Batteries (Not Included) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2-pk 5 Inch LED Color Changing Mood Light
